emails.body: Re: Revised PPL/Griffith Proposal Chris, I can't read these but my real quesiton is If the $.07 is a demand charge and Grigsby gets $.04, we should still get the other $.03 because it will be charged on all volumes that CAN be taken, whether they take them or not right??
